scripts.install:all: npm install --prefix sdk/game && npm install --prefix games/connect4 && npm install --prefix games/sovereign-bluff && npm install --prefix games/signal-duel && npm install --prefix backend && npm install --prefix contracts && npm install --prefix frontend && npm install --prefix sdk/agent && npm install --prefix operator && npm install --prefix operator/web
scripts.test: npm run test:games && npm test --prefix backend && npm test --prefix sdk/agent && npm test --prefix contracts && npm run build --prefix frontend
scripts.test:games: npm test --prefix sdk/game && npm test --prefix games/connect4 && npm test --prefix games/sovereign-bluff && npm test --prefix games/signal-duel
